sourcePara1: Source is sent as gallery for face comparison.
sourcePara2: Liveness does not use Source. It runs on Target in the next step.
targetPara1: This Target image is the probe.
targetPara2: If compare passes your threshold, liveness runs on this image only. Source is not used for liveness.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this step.
cameraSubtitleTarget: Capture the target image with liveness
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
cropCheckboxTitle: Crop my Source photo to the detected face
cropCheckboxBody: When on, we detect the largest face in your first image (Source, step 1) and replace it with a cropped region around that face before we send it as gallery. Your second image (Target, step 2) is sent as you captured it, with no crop in this demo. Use this for group shots, ID scans, or busy frames where the face is small or off center.
cropErrorNoFace: We couldn’t detect a face to crop in your Source photo (step 1). Try a clearer picture, or turn off Source face crop and try again.
cropErrorGeneric: We couldn’t crop your Source photo. Try another image, or turn off Source face crop.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Compare first; if the face score meets compare_min_score (or it is omitted), liveness runs on the probe image against liveness_min_score.
apiRefProbeGallery: In this demo, Source is the gallery image (step 1). Target is the probe (step 2). You can optionally detect the largest face in the Source and crop the image to that region in the browser before sending. The Target image is not cropped here. Server integrations may also support cropping via cropFace.
paramGalleryDesc: Reference images (base64; https URLs supported server-side)
bulletSeq: Comparison runs first; liveness on probe only if compare passes your threshold (or threshold omitted).
bulletLivenessDefault: liveness_min_score defaults to 0.6 when not sent.
bulletGalleryUrl: Gallery may use https URLs; the service fetches and converts them.
msgVerified: Compare passed your threshold and probe liveness passed.
msgBelowSkip: Face similarity is below compare_min_score, so liveness was not executed.
msgBelowMatch: Face similarity is below the compare threshold.
msgLivenessLow: Probe liveness score is below the configured minimum.
engineBlock:
ENGINE: HumanAuthn
PROTO: CWL_SEQ
AUTH: PENDING
mustSignIn: You must be signed in to run this demo.
